title: Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat OpenShift distributed tracing platform (Tempo) 3.8.0 release

description: Red Hat OpenShift distributed tracing platform (Tempo) 3.8.0 has been released
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat OpenShift distributed tracing platform (Tempo) 3.8.0 release

Red Hat OpenShift distributed tracing platform (Tempo) 3.8.0 has been released

Red Hat OpenShift distributed tracing platform (Tempo) 3.8.0 has been released



CVE-2025-59375: A memory amplification vulnerability in libexpat allows attackers to trigger excessive dynamic memory allocations by submitting specially crafted XML input. A small input (~250 KiB) can cause the parser to allocate hundreds of megabytes, leading to denial-of-service (DoS) through memory exhaustion.
